name: proyecto-tatuajes-grupo-g
description: Sistema integrado INK & IRON: Catálogo (React), Reservas (Vue), Admin (Angular)

scripts.dev: npm run stop:ports && concurrently "npm run dev:container" "npm run dev:react" "npm run dev:vue" "npm run dev:angular"
scripts.stop:ports: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "foreach ($p in 5173,5174,5176,4200) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $ids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($id in $ids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host ('Stopped PID ' + $id + ' on port ' + $p) } catch {} } } }; exit 0"
scripts.build: npm run build:all && npm run copy-dist
scripts.build:all: tsc && vite build && cd modulo-react && npm run build && cd ../modulo_vue && npm run build && cd ../modulo_angular && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run preview
